title: Hushed consolidation slice complete - critical and hard napkin pressure drained
body: Claim b530ace4 complete: live fitness moved from CRITICAL (napkin line-width) to SOFT (21 soft). Preserved the processed active napkin window at .agent/memory/active/archive/napkin-2026-05-24-post-m1-cleanups-window.md, seeded a fresh active napkin, and validated markdownlint plus git diff --check on touched napkin surfaces. Soft surfaces remain for later consolidation; no source/product lanes touched.
